content.en:
"Ye Tian Realm Lord, you are going to descend to the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, are you sure?"

"Confirm!"

"It's locking the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and it's about to come to consciousness!"

Ye Tian was lying on a roulette wheel, this roulette wheel was the Void Heaven Roulette of the Void Heaven Palace, it was one of the ultimate treasures, it could lock many dimensional heaven and earth, and it could come silently, without attracting the attention of those powerhouses inside the Divine Heaven and Earth.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's soul consciousness was directly taken up by the Void Heaven Roulette and then put into the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

So far.

All of Ye Tian's copied bodies fell into a deep sleep, and all their consciousness entered the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

......

God Dimension Heaven and Earth.

Inside a dilapidated sect.

Ye Tian's consciousness occupied the body of a severely injured teenager.

Wow!

He opened his eyes without the slightest panic, then checked his body, spied on his surroundings, and made sure that he was safe for the time being, and then sorted out the memories of the teenager in his mind.

"Desolate Heaven Sect, Yang Wu. "

Yang Wu belongs to the Shenwei Heaven and Earth Desolate Clan, the Desolate Clan has a very tall body and two horns on his head, but in the entire Shenwei Heaven and Earth, that is, it belongs to an ordinary race.

"The suppressive power of this heaven and earth is very strong, and there is a special multi-dimensional power between heaven and earth, which should be the power of the divine dimension. 703 Ye Tian tried to manipulate the Supreme Dimensional Rules, but he waved his hand and there was nothing.

"Sure enough, in the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, all other forces cannot be controlled, and the Supreme Dimensional Rules are blocked, and there is only the dimensional power of the Divine Dimension here. "

Ye Tian had to forget about other powers, concentrate on the power of Shenwei, and cultivate this power to the extreme, before he could master the ultimate dimension killing moves.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to study this side of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and he found that all the substances in the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth were very special, I am afraid that when the ordinary extradimensional realm enters here, they are all like ordinary people.

By sorting out the boy's plan, he knew that this heaven and earth only absorbed the power of the gods between heaven and earth to refine his body.

This Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth divides the degree of physical refinement into one dimension to eighteen dimensions, and after the physical body reaches the eighteenth dimension, it must be polarized, if it can really complete the polarization, you can transcend the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and leave here to enter the sea of dimensions.

"Completing the ultimate is equivalent to mastering the ultimate dimension killing move!"

This is just his guess, and it is not very clear what the specific situation is.

He is currently in the Desolate Heaven Sect, which is a small sect, but it was once very powerful, and it has given birth to a powerhouse of the eighteenth dimension.

But now, the Desolate Heaven Sect has fallen incomparably, and the strongest one is only the seventh dimension.

As for this body, it was only in the late one-dimensional realm, and its strength was very weak, and not long ago, the predecessor of this body fought with a two-dimensional disciple, and was easily hit hard by the other party, and lay on the bed for a long time, and then Ye Tian's consciousness occupied the body.

Wasteland Sect, Wasteland Pavilion.

Ye Tian was going to go here to inquire about some Divine Dimension secret books, which recorded how to use the power of Divine Dimension to refine the body.

And he wants to create a better and more perfect Shenwei cheats through the study of the Divine Dimension Secret Book.

On the way to the Wasteland Pavilion, a young girl seemed to be walking too fast and bumped into Ye Tian at once.

Ye Tian was also thinking about things, so he forgot to dodge for a while.

And just when Ye Tian's hand touched the other party's body, he saw the other party's talent.

Talent: Shenwei (Low)

"I'm sorry. "

The girl apologized.

"It's okay!" Ye Tian smiled.

The girl is not a desolate tribe, but a green tribe, and looks a little like a human, except that she has cyan scales on her body, but she does not have it on her face.

The girl apologized and left.

And Ye Tian was thinking about the talent situation he had just seen.

"When I first came to the Divine Dimension, I thought I hadn't brought my copying talent with me. "

He tried to urge the talent of copying, but he couldn't do it, snooped on other people, and couldn't spy on other people's talents.

Therefore, he subconsciously thought that the talent for copying was not there. (cbcb)

But now it seems that the copying talent is directly suppressed to the most primitive point by the Shenwei Heaven and Earth, that is, you need to touch the other party to copy the other party's talent.

And just now, he directly copied the other party's low-level divine talent.

"Looks like we'll have to go the same way!"

Ye Tian smiled.

After coming to the Wasteland Pavilion, he flipped through all kinds of divine secret books, his memory was still there, and he easily remembered all kinds of secret books.

Soon after, he came out of the Wasteland Pavilion.

His current copying talent is not only suppressed to the point that he needs to touch it to copy, but he doesn't even have the function of spying on enemies, so he can only open blind boxes.

Maybe after his strength is strong, some functions of copying talent will be turned on normally.

"You have to copy a genius's divine talent, the low-level divine talent is still too spicy!"

The Desolate Heaven Sect is very weak, but there is still a genius.

That one is the daughter of the current sect master of the Desolate Heaven Sect, Baili Qingye, the other party's cultivation years are very short, but he is already a five-dimensional powerhouse.

In this dimension, heaven and earth are counted in the years of the gods, and a year of the gods is equivalent to an epoch of years.

After returning to your accommodation.

Through his own experience and understanding, Ye Tian began to transform and perfect a divine secret method suitable for himself.

Time passes slowly.

"Tianwei Secret Method!"

This is the Divine Dimension Secret Method created by Ye Tian himself, and it is more powerful than other secret methods I don't know how many times.

Immediately, Ye Tian changed to the secret method of Tianwei.

Rumble!!!!

The dimensional power of the divine dimension descended wisps of breath, which were absorbed by Ye Tian to refine his body.

His body structure began to change, becoming stronger and tougher.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation has finally stepped from the first dimension to the second dimension, but the qualification and talent of this body are not good, if he obtains a high divine dimensional talent, he can save countless time.

However, nine out of ten of the countless creatures in the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth are low-level Divine Dimensional talents or even no talents, and it is completely by luck that they came here.

Like the Lord of the Void Immortal Realm, he descended on a god dimension heaven and earth 70,000 times.

He estimated that the qualifications of the Void Immortal Realm Lord to descend on his body many times were not good, and it was difficult to cultivate to an extremely high level, which led to being killed by a strong enemy and having no choice but to return.

Therefore, talent is still very important.

He didn't rush to touch Baili Qingye, he was a five-dimensional powerhouse, if he suddenly touched someone, he would definitely be killed by her.

Therefore, he has to improve his strength.

After that, he continued to practice to improve his strength, and also began to create killer moves.

Only by mastering the killing moves, can the power of the divine body burst out and show terrifying combat power.
